Rapid Fire Test - Round #1
The Framework
RAPID FIRE TESTING - ROUND #1
In this first round you are testing out the personas that make up your client's target
audience to assess who will be most responsive. You may end up finding quite a few
successful personas come out from this test - which is great!
PLEASE NOTE: If your client already has existing data on the best personas here, you
can skip this round and go straight to Round #2
STEPS
Step#1: Break down your client's personas
Step #2: Set up your rapid fire testing outline inside the template provided
Step #3: Set up a lead generation campaign - make sure to use naming conventions
here!
Step #4: Set up each persona as it's own ad set within the one campaign
Step #5: Set up your creative (aim for at least 3 ads per ad set) - keep these generic
and without any mention of lead magnets for now.
Step #6: Add creative to your client ad creative sheet (click here to access) and follow
steps to ad approval
Step #7: Make sure your ads are all paused until the client approves creative!
WHAT YOU'LL NEED
1. Privacy Policy
2. At least 3 x images (to test in ads)
3. Your personas
4. Your ad copy (keep this direct response for now - watch video for explanation on
this)
Rapid Fire Tracking Sheet
Ad Approval Sheet
Mark As Complete
